content_body:
Ocoee Rafting is the oldest company on the Ocoee River and have provided guided whitewater rafting adventures for 44 years.

Since 1976, Ocoee Rafting has welcomed many miles of challenging and exciting Class III and IV rapids on one of the country's premier rivers.

Experience Ocoee River Rafting and feel the excitement of whitewater rafting on the Ocoee River.

Ocoee River rafting trips run on weekends only in the months of April, May, September, and October. During June, July, and August, they run trips every day except on Tuesdays and Wednesdays.

No experience is necessary to enjoy the adventure of whitewater rafting on the World Class Ocoee River.
title: Ocoee Rafting
